study.name: Sorghum bicolor
study.title: Impact of modulating bioenergy traits on the sorghum microbiome under drought conditions
study.description: The goal of this project was to determine the consequences of engineering sorghum bioenergy traits on the associated microbial communities in the soil, rhizosphere, and root endosphere.
